_comment_2: Values are inclusive-low, exclusive-high on reward.py cl_score (negative; 0 = on centerline; lane_usage is now uncapped so cl_score is unbounded negative for past-boundary trajectories).
_comment_3: cap removed; cl_score is unbounded negative, bands match historical cap=1 ranges only by accident. These MUST match the reward_config used at replay time (cl_score is already logged in metrics_log.json per step). If you change usage_mode in training, rebuild bands.

stopped_filter._why: TL runs contain many frames at rest; training on them would reward-hack to always-stop.

lane_change_detection._why: An actual lane change saturates cl_score to the floor for ~2 s+ (20 sim steps). These are bucketed separately — not all lane changes are real, and they inflate the very_hot band.

_comment_decluster: Min step gap between kept scenes in the same band. 10 steps = 1 s.

gate_filters._why: Drop scenes where the ego is already in a gate-terminated state at t=0 (no amount of training can recover from an off-road start), or where the model's own 80-step prediction collides / crosses a border in the first N steps (first-N check proxies 'the scene's near-future is already broken without any guidance').
gate_filters._lane_comment: User flagged that LD may hurt — keep it false by default, train configs that disable enable_lane_departure are the ones that want this filter. Flip to true to exclude LD-violating scenes.
gate_filters._coll_comment: reward.py stores collision_step over the model's 80-step pred; if it fires in the first 15 (=1.5s) the scene is effectively unrecoverable from this start.
